description_long: This rifle features a striking blue digital camouflage pattern across its main body, giving it a modern, tactical appearance suitable for urban environments. The stock and cheek rest are rendered in a wood-like brown, contrasting with the synthetic blue and black elements. The rifle has a detachable box magazine, a black pistol grip, and a prominent barrel with a flash hider at the muzzle. The top of the receiver appears to have a rail for mounting optics, though only basic iron sights are visible. The overall design is compact and ergonomic, with a collapsible or adjustable stock for user comfort. The combination of materials and colors suggests a blend of durability and style, making it visually distinctive.
description: A modern rifle with blue digital camouflage, brown stock, and black grip, featuring a detachable magazine and flash hider. Its compact, tactical design is visually striking and urban-ready.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue camo body, brown stock, black grip, and full length of the barrel with flash hider.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel's muzzle, narrow profile, and alignment of the sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blue camo, brown stock, and magazine, mirroring the main features of view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the brown stock and cheek rest, with the barrel extending away from the viewer.
